_comment: Phase-0 parity baseline for the global_watch unification (docs/REFACTOR_GLOBAL_WATCH_UNIFICATION.md). Locks run_watch_provider's dispatch -> normalized-hits output per provider from fixed input rows. Phase 1 (dispatch via search_provider) must keep these digests for the shared-connector providers (europepmc/openalex/crossref). Regenerate only with a documented decision.
